bullets: Sole architect and engineer on OpenVibe — a 15-microservice open-source platform kernel: distributed event bus, OIDC/OAuth2 identity provider, capability contract registry, media object store, live-streaming ingest and restream, real-time chat, billing ledger, AI/search backbone, and realtime infrastructure. Self-hosted alternative to Twitch + YouTube + Patreon + Discord. 16 phases documented; 11+ fully implemented with cutover runbook and migration tooling complete.

Built and operated HoboStreamer from scratch — a full live-streaming platform with WebRTC SFU, HLS, multi-destination RTMP restream (OBS → Twitch/YouTube/Kick simultaneously), auto-recorded VODs, clip detection, real-time chat with custom emotes, voice channels, stream analytics, comprehensive moderation tools, and an integrated browser game for viewers. Fully open source.

Built HoboQuest — a persistent server-authoritative browser MMORPG: 512×512 tile open world, 7 skill systems, PvP, dungeons, base building, daily quests, leaderboards, and a collaborative pixel canvas. Integrated live into HoboStreamer so viewers play alongside the broadcast.

Maintained hobo.tools — central SSO and OAuth2 identity network across 14 interconnected services, including shared auth, service registry, image processing, maps, audio, and cross-domain session management.
